extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against the relevant parties: I counted only the Against Company, Against Directors, Against Promoters and Against the Subsidiaries rows. Criminal proceedings against total 35 (25+5+5+0), statutory/regulatory proceedings against total 28 (24+2+2+0), and tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries total 4 (1+3); all By rows were excluded, and tax was kept separate from regulatory proceedings. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is ₹4.37 million plus ₹16.49 million = ₹20.86 million, or ₹2.086 crore; promoter/director amounts were not included because they are personal matters and/or not quantifiable. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹33.31 million as of June 30, 2022, converted to ₹3.331 crore, rather than summing the line items. The only concentration disclosure is for two super-stockists, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customers, so both concentration fields are null; the disclosed percentages relate to sale of food products, not company-wide top-five/top-ten revenue. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
